summary: Structured Ruleset Integration for Character Builder - All 16 tests PASSED. Backend API: 11/11 passed. Frontend E2E: 5/5 passed. Feature allows GMs to upload custom races, classes, subclasses, backgrounds, and feats that players can use when creating characters.

breakdown.frontend_campaign_builder: 5/5 passed - Character Builder with campaign content

seed_data_creation: Used existing test campaign eabd4ae0-d1d8-40a5-858e-f7772af1d2ce with custom races and classes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Structured Ruleset Integration tested successfully. Key findings: 1) Character Builder uses route /characters/new (NOT /create-character). 2) Campaign content loaded via ?campaignId=xxx query param. 3) Custom content displays with star (★) indicators in orange/gold styling. 4) Custom races, classes appear BEFORE standard content in lists. 5) ability_bonuses object is correctly formatted to string (e.g., {strength: 2, charisma: 1} becomes '+2 STR, +1 CHA'). 6) Toast notification shows when custom content loads. 7) Campaign name displays in header with 'For Campaign:' prefix.

endpoints: GET /api/campaigns/{id} - Returns campaign info including name

data_format.has_custom_content: Boolean flag indicating if custom content exists

features: Campaign name in header with star icon
Campaign Custom section at top of race list
Ability bonuses formatted as +X STR, +Y CHA
Custom content positioned before standard content
